title: CreateSurvivalSMP Tool Master
description: This mod adds a lot of cool stuff to spice up Minecraft!
body:
## ### **This mod adds a lot of cool little items to spice up Minecraft!**
_*Requires: Create Mod and JEI_

### ## Features include:
- Legendary weapons made from rare materials!
- Magic wands, that improve your quality-of-life,
- New advancements and music discs!
- Armour and Camouflage blocks,
- And much much more!
